element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Basic dogfighting and freighter inspection in controlled scenario
Short-range weapon fundamentals established in initial combat
Disabling targets as alternative to destruction
Balancing resource allocation under combat pressure
Escorting, attacking, and learning large-target engagement
Extended-range weapon systems with limited ammunition
Surgical strikes on shield generators and weapons systems
Crowd control and enemy fighter immobilization

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Early missions (becomes critical in unshielded craft)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: System prioritization under damage; learning consequences of exposure
Optional content for advancement and deeper story immersion

typical_tension_triggers: Hull damage accumulation in unshielded craft
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Progressive escalation from simple escort/inspection missions to complex multi-objective combat scenarios; difficulty increases through craft progression and enemy variety rather than pure intensity spikes; relief structured through mission compartmentalization and hub-based pacing breaks

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Secondary objectives briefed by Inner Circle representative; separate combat chamber offers historical reenactment missions; tech room provides reconnaissance information
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Secret objectives exist but convention not detailed in source

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory missions with basic TIE fighter variants (unshielded); simple objectives like freighter inspection and basic dogfighting; controlled threat environment
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Transition to shielded craft; introduction of advanced weapon systems (missiles, torpedoes); complex multi-objective missions; capital ship engagement introduced
difficulty_curve.late_game: Elite TIE variants with specialized equipment (tractor beam, jamming beam); high-stakes missions involving Imperial internal conflict and coup prevention; final mission features ceremonial reward suggesting mission success threshold
notable_spikes: First shielded fighter introduction (new power management layer)
Initial capital ship attack (scale and complexity increase)
Missions involving traitorous Imperial forces (faction complexity)
Expansion pack content (civil war and coup scenarios)

notable_level_patterns.description: Concourse acts as central safe hub with branching features: training simulator, combat chamber, mission recordings, tech room. Creates psychological relief between sorties and allows non-linear skill development

notable_level_patterns.pattern_name: Linear Mission Sequences within Tour of Duty
notable_level_patterns.description: While tours can be played out of order, individual missions within each tour are strictly sequential, creating narrative coherence and difficulty progression within chapters
Primary objectives required for progression; secondary/secret objectives for deeper reward and story. Allows multiple difficulty approaches and replayability incentive without forcing mastery
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Most missions with Inner Circle briefing

notable_level_patterns.description: Early missions force unshielded fighter variants, creating resource management tension. Shield access gates into mid-game, allowing new strategies; specialized weapons gate late-game content
Missions assign specific roles (dogfighting, escorting, disabling, inspecting, attacking capital ships) that recur with increasing complexity, creating mastery curve within familiar frameworks
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Mission 1 (inspection) through late missions (multi-role complex scenarios)
